result:
Fleshed petition written to `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/eval-a/reps/3/patron-flesh/ghost-config.md`.

Key move: I reframed the brief (#39). The brief framed this as a deferred follow-up cleanup, scheduled after the old two-phase-planning rig retires. My taste rejects that — the field is already dead (vestigial since landing, unset by every guild, resolves to its default always), so principles #1 and #38 point to removing it now in its own small commission rather than parking it. The cleanup is trivial, behavior-preserving, and leaving the ghost knob around invites future confusion about whether it's a real extension point.

Scope pinned to: drop the field from `AstrolabeConfig`, inline `'mandate'` at the `spec-publish` read site, delete any doc mentions. Out: retiring the old rig (separate petition), deprecation shim (#1), or preserving the field speculatively (#18). Deferred questions ask the planner to sanity-check for external consumers and any test parameterizing the writ type before shipping.
